author: smuzaffar
body:
This fixes the issue due to duplicate kalmanLUTs.root file in cmssw and cms-data ( see #33303 ).

Testing this PR will fail as during the PR tests the CMSSW_SEARCH_PATH is set to
```
CMSSW_BASE/poison
CMSSW_BASE/src
CMSSW_BASE/externals/data
```
as this PR is deleting the data file, so build system is going to create a poison `CMSSW_BASE/poison/L1Trigger/L1TMuon/data/bmtf_luts/kalmanLUTs.root`  which will be loaded by cmsRun. I would suggest that once https://github.com/cms-data/L1Trigger-L1TMuon/pull/20 is merged then please force merge this too
title: move kalmanLUTs.root to cms-data external
